column5: Angular GRAVEL, COBBLES and BOULDERS of moderately decomposed granite with some grey, silty sand with some red bricks and concrete fragments (FILL)

Moderately strong to strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately to slightly decomposed, medium to coarse grained GRANITE with medium to closely spaced, extremely narrow, rough planar, limonite, manganese stained and kaolin coated joints, dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees & 65 degrees-85 degrees
